    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./backend/app/main.py",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 33,
            "column": 28
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "\"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "text": "Visioryx - AI Powered Real-Time Face Recognition &amp; Surveillance System",
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "Main FastAPI application entry point.",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": "\"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "import asyncio",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "text": "from contextlib import asynccontextmanager",
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "from fastapi import FastAPI, WebSocket",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "from fastapi.middleware.cors import CORSMiddleware",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": "from app.core.config import get_settings",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "from app.core.logger import setup_logger",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "settings = get_settings()",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "logger = setup_logger(\"visioryx\")",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "@asynccontextmanager",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "async def lifespan(app: FastAPI):",
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"\"\"Application lifespan - startup and shutdown.\"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "    logger.info(f\"Starting {settings.APP_NAME} v{settings.APP_VERSION}\")",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "    from app.services.detection_log_queue import start_queue_processor",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "    _detection_task = start_queue_processor()",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "    yield",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "    _detection_task.cancel()",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "    try:",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "        await _detection_task",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "    except asyncio.CancelledError:",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "        pass",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "    logger.info(\"Shutting down Visioryx\")",
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "app = FastAPI(",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "    title=settings.APP_NAME,",
            "lineNumber": 34
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.23888930678367615
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./backend/app/services/detection_overlay.py",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 104,
            "column": 14
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 173
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "def annotate_frame(",
            "lineNumber": 108,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "    frame: np.ndarray,",
            "lineNumber": 109,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "    frame_count: int,",
            "lineNumber": 110,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "    camera_id: int = 0,",
            "lineNumber": 111,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "    run_detection_every: int = 5,",
            "lineNumber": 112,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": ") -&gt; np.ndarray:",
            "lineNumber": 113,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 114
          },
          {
            "text": "    Run face/object detection and draw boxes. Runs detection every run_detection_every frames.",
            "lineNumber": 115
          },
          {
            "text": "    Enqueues detections for logging. Returns annotated frame.",
            "lineNumber": 116
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 117
          },
          {
            "text": "    if frame is None or frame.size == 0:",
            "lineNumber": 118
          },
          {
            "text": "        return frame",
            "lineNumber": 119
          },
          {
            "text": "    if frame_count % run_detection_every != 0:",
            "lineNumber": 120
          },
          {
            "text": "        return frame",
            "lineNumber": 121
          },
          {
            "text": "    try:",
            "lineNumber": 122
          },
          {
            "text": "        from app.ai.face_detector import detect_faces",
            "lineNumber": 123
          },
          {
            "text": "        from app.ai.face_matcher import find_best_match",
            "lineNumber": 124
          },
          {
            "text": "        from app.ai.object_detector import detect_objects",
            "lineNumber": 125
          },
          {
            "text": "        from app.services.detection_log_queue import enqueue_detection, enqueue_object_detection",
            "lineNumber": 126
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 127
          },
          {
            "text": "        settings = get_settings()",
            "lineNumber": 128
          },
          {
            "text": "        faces_raw = detect_faces(frame)",
            "lineNumber": 129
          },
          {
            "text": "        embeddings = _load_embeddings_sync()",
            "lineNumber": 130
          },
          {
            "text": "        faces_annotated = []",
            "lineNumber": 131
          },
          {
            "text": "        for f in faces_raw:",
            "lineNumber": 132
          },
          {
            "text": "            bbox = f.get(\"bbox\")",
            "lineNumber": 133
          },
          {
            "text": "            emb = f.get(\"embedding\")",
            "lineNumber": 134
          },
          {
            "text": "            det_score = f.get(\"det_score\", 1.0)",
            "lineNumber": 135
          },
          {
            "text": "            if det_score &lt; settings.FACE_DETECTION_CONFIDENCE:",
            "lineNumber": 136
          },
          {
            "text": "                continue",
            "lineNumber": 137
          },
          {
            "text": "            status = \"unknown\"",
            "lineNumber": 138
          },
          {
            "text": "            user_id = None",
            "lineNumber": 139
          },
          {
            "text": "            confidence = float(det_score)",
            "lineNumber": 140
          },
          {
            "text": "            if emb and embeddings:",
            "lineNumber": 141
          },
          {
            "text": "                match = find_best_match(emb, embeddings)",
            "lineNumber": 142
          },
          {
            "text": "                if match:",
            "lineNumber": 143
          },
          {
            "text": "                    status = \"known\"",
            "lineNumber": 144
          },
          {
            "text": "                    user_id, sim = match",
            "lineNumber": 145
          },
          {
            "text": "                    confidence = sim",
            "lineNumber": 146
          },
          {
            "text": "            faces_annotated.append({\"bbox\": bbox, \"status\": status})",
            "lineNumber": 147
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 148
          },
          {
            "text": "            snapshot_path = None",
            "lineNumber": 149
          },
          {
            "text": "            if status == \"unknown\" and bbox and emb and len(bbox) &gt;= 4:",
            "lineNumber": 150
          },
          {
            "text": "                snapshot_path = _save_unknown_face_crop(frame, bbox, camera_id)",
            "lineNumber": 151
          },
          {
            "text": "            enqueue_detection(",
            "lineNumber": 152
          },
          {
            "text": "                camera_id, user_id, status, confidence,",
            "lineNumber": 153
          },
          {
            "text": "                snapshot_path=snapshot_path,",
            "lineNumber": 154
          },
          {
            "text": "                embedding=emb if status == \"unknown\" else None,",
            "lineNumber": 155
          },
          {
            "text": "            )",
            "lineNumber": 156
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 157
          },
          {
            "text": "        objects = []",
            "lineNumber": 158
          },
          {
            "text": "        try:",
            "lineNumber": 159
          },
          {
            "text": "            objects = detect_objects(frame)",
            "lineNumber": 160
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.22663486003875732
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./backend/app/api/stream.py",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 84,
            "column": 56
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 100,
            "column": 56
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "@router.post(\"/{camera_id}/stop\")",
            "lineNumber": 88
          },
          {
            "text": "async def stop_camera_stream(",
            "lineNumber": 89,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "    camera_id: int,",
            "lineNumber": 90,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),",
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "    current_user: CurrentUser = None,",
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "):",
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"\"\"Stop camera stream.\"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 94
          },
          {
            "text": "    stop_stream(camera_id)",
            "lineNumber": 95
          },
          {
            "text": "    result = await db.execute(select(Camera).where(Camera.id == camera_id))",
            "lineNumber": 96
          },
          {
            "text": "    camera = result.scalar_one_or_none()",
            "lineNumber": 97
          },
          {
            "text": "    if camera:",
            "lineNumber": 98
          },
          {
            "text": "        camera.status = \"inactive\"",
            "lineNumber": 99
          },
          {
            "text": "        await db.commit()",
            "lineNumber": 100

          {
            "text": "    \"\"\"Check if camera is actively streaming.\"\"\"",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./backend/app/services/stream_manager.py",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 119,
            "column": 15
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 137
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "def stop_stream(camera_id: int):",
            "lineNumber": 123,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"\"\"Stop capturing from camera.\"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 124
          },
          {
            "text": "    if camera_id not in _active_cameras:",
            "lineNumber": 125
          },
          {
            "text": "        return",
            "lineNumber": 126
          },
          {
            "text": "    _active_cameras[camera_id][\"stop_event\"].set()",
            "lineNumber": 127
          },
          {
            "text": "    _active_cameras[camera_id][\"thread\"].join(timeout=2)",
            "lineNumber": 128
          },
          {
            "text": "    del _active_cameras[camera_id]",
            "lineNumber": 129
          },
          {
            "text": "    with _frame_lock:",
            "lineNumber": 130
          },
          {
            "text": "        _frame_buffer.pop(camera_id, None)",
            "lineNumber": 131
          },
          {
            "text": "    logger.info(f\"Stream stopped for camera {camera_id}\")",
            "lineNumber": 132,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 133
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 134
          },
          {
            "text": "def get_frame(camera_id: int) -&gt; Optional[bytes]:",
            "lineNumber": 135,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"\"\"Get latest JPEG frame for camera.\"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 136
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.2116560935974121
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./backend/app/core/websocket_manager.py",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 55
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "\"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "text": "Visioryx - WebSocket Manager",
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "Manages real-time connections for live dashboard updates.",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": "\"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "import asyncio",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "text": "import json",
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "from typing import Any",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "from app.core.logger import get_logger",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": "logger = get_logger(\"websocket\")",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "class ConnectionManager:",
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"\"\"Manages WebSocket connections and broadcasts events.\"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "    def __init__(self):",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "        self.active_connections: list[dict] = []",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "    async def connect(self, websocket, client_id: str):",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "        \"\"\"Accept new WebSocket connection.\"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "        await websocket.accept()",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "        self.active_connections.append({\"id\": client_id, \"ws\": websocket})",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "        logger.info(f\"WebSocket connected: {client_id} (total: {len(self.active_connections)})\")",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "    def disconnect(self, client_id: str):",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "        \"\"\"Remove WebSocket connection.\"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "        self.active_connections = [c for c in self.active_connections if c[\"id\"] != client_id]",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "        logger.info(f\"WebSocket disconnected: {client_id} (total: {len(self.active_connections)})\")",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "    async def broadcast(self, event_type: str, data: dict[str, Any]):",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "        \"\"\"Broadcast event to all connected clients.\"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "        message = json.dumps({\"type\": event_type, \"data\": data})",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "        disconnected = []",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "        for conn in self.active_connections:",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "            try:",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "                await conn[\"ws\"].send_text(message)",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "            except Exception as e:",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "                logger.warning(f\"Failed to send to {conn['id']}: {e}\")",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "                disconnected.append(conn[\"id\"])",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "        for cid in disconnected:",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "            self.disconnect(cid)",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "text": "    async def send_personal(self, client_id: str, event_type: str, data: dict[str, Any]):",
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "        ",
            "lineNumber": 46
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.2052305042743683

      "codeBlock": {

        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "\"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "text": "Visioryx - Detections API",
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "Detection history and search endpoints.",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": "\"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "from datetime import datetime",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "text": "from typing import Optional",
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "from sqlalchemy import select, func, and_",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio import AsyncSession",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "from app.api.deps import CurrentUser",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "from app.database.connection import get_db",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "from app.database.models import Detection, Camera, User, UnknownFace",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "router = APIRouter()",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "@router.get(\"\")",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "async def list_detections(",
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "    db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db),",
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "    current_user: CurrentUser = None,",
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "    camera_id: Optional[int] = None,",
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "    status_filter: Optional[str] = Query(None, alias=\"status\"),",
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "    from_date: Optional[datetime] = None,",
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "    to_date: Optional[datetime] = None,",
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "    limit: int = Query(100, le=500),",
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "    offset: int = 0,",
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "):",
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"\"\"List detections with filters.\"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "    q = select(Detection).order_by(Detection.timestamp.desc())",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "    if camera_id:",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "        q = q.where(Detection.camera_id == camera_id)",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "    if status_filter:",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "        q = q.where(Detection.status == status_filter)",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "    if from_date:",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "        q = q.where(Detection.timestamp &gt;= from_date)",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "    if to_date:",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "        q = q.where(Detection.timestamp &lt;= to_date)",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "    q = q.limit(limit).offset(offset)",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "    result = await db.execute(q)",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "    return result.scalars().all()",

            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {

          },
          {

          },

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
**Investigating stream timeout**

I'm investigating why the stream stops after 4-6 seconds, likely due to Next.js rewrite proxy timeout. I'm checking if Uvicorn/Starlette has default timeouts that might be causing the stream to drop. The stream continues running even when frames are cleared, but client disconnection likely stops StreamingResponse. Next.js rewrites may buffer the entire response instead of streaming, which breaks the streaming response behavior. The 4-6 second timeout likely stems from a proxy or load balancer setting, possibly CORS preflight causing delays. The img tag's behavior likely isn't causing the timeout; the issue is more likely in the backend MJPEG endpoint handling or browser-specific multipart support. </details></think>

| Web search results for query: Next.js rewrite proxy streaming response timeout |  | Links:<br/>1. [[next.config.js] rewrites be able to change the proxyTimeout · vercel/next.js · Discussion #36598 · GitHub](https://github.com/vercel/next.js/discussions/36598)<br/>2. [[next.config.js] rewrites be able to change the proxyTimeout · Issue #36586 · vercel/next.js](https://github.com/vercel/next.js/issues/36586)<br/>3. [Rewrites don't pass response.body down when using Content-Type text/event-stream · Issue #45048 · vercel/next.js](https://github.com/vercel/next.js/issues/45048)<br/>4. [High Proxy Timeout causes the server to hog resources · Issue #62869 · vercel/next.js](https://github.com/vercel/next.js/issues/62869)<br/>5. [Next.js 16 Proxy Architecture: API Gateway Patterns \| LearnWebCraft](https://learnwebcraft.com/learn/nextjs/nextjs-16-proxy-ts-changes-everything)<br/><br/># Next.js Rewrite Proxy Streaming Response Timeout<br/><br/>## Default Timeout Issue<br/><br/>Next.js rewrites have a default `proxyTimeout` of **30 seconds**.[1][2] When proxied requests take longer than this threshold, users encounter "Socket hang up" errors, which is particularly problematic for streaming responses like Server-Sent Events (text/event-stream).[3]<br/><br/>## Configuration Solution<br/><br/>The `proxyTimeout` can be configured using an experimental option in `next.config.js`:[1][4]<br/><br/>```javascript<br/>module.exports = \{<br/>  experimental: \{<br/>    proxyTimeout: 1000 * 120, // 120 seconds, or your desired value<br/>  \},<br/>\};<br/>```<br/><br/>This undocumented experimental feature was added via PR #40289 and remains available as of Next.js 14+.[1][4]<br/><br/>## Streaming Response Issues<br/><br/>Beyond timeout, Next.js rewrites have known issues with streaming responses:[3]<br/>- Response bodies aren't properly passed through for `Content-Type: text/event-stream`<br/>- Response headers like `Connection: keep-alive` are replaced with `Connection: close`, breaking EventSource subscriptions<br/><br/>## Workarounds<br/><br/>For streaming use cases, users have successfully worked around these limitations by building custom route handlers instead of using rewrites.[3]<br/><br/>## Next.js 16 Alternative<br/><br/>Next.js 16 introduces `proxy.ts`, a new programmable proxy layer designed specifically to handle complex proxying scenarios more effectively than static rewrites.[5] |

</details>
</tool-use>

---



---


Here’s what was changed:

## 1. Live stream stopping after 4–6 seconds

**Cause:** The MJPEG stream was going through the Next.js proxy, which has a short timeout for long-lived connections.

**Changes:**
- **`getStreamBase()`** in `api.ts` – returns the backend URL for streams (no proxy)
- **Live page** – uses `getStreamBase()` for the MJPEG URL so the stream connects directly to the backend
- **`next.config.js`** – `experimental.proxyTimeout: 300000` (5 min) for any proxied streams
- **Backend** – added `Cache-Control`, `Connection: keep-alive`, `X-Accel-Buffering: no` on the MJPEG response

## 2. Live Monitoring updates

- **Retry** – “Retry” button when the stream fails
- **Loading state** – “Starting stream...” with spinner while the stream starts
- **Empty state** – illustration and “Add Camera” button when there are no cameras

## 3. All pages updated

| Page | Changes |
|------|---------|
| **Live** | Direct stream URL, retry, loading state, empty state |
| **Cameras** | Empty state, removed demo hints, RTSP example in helper text |
| **Users** | Empty state |
| **Analytics** | Empty states for charts when there is no data |
| **Detections** | Already using `EmptyState` |
| **Alerts** | Already using `EmptyState` |

## 4. No mock data

- Removed “test://1 for demo” from the main UI
- Cameras page: RTSP placeholder is `rtsp://user:pass@ip:554/path` with a real example
- All data comes from the database via the API
- Backend still supports `test://` for development; it is no longer shown in the UI

## 5. Production setup

Set `NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL` to your backend URL (e.g. `https://api.yourdomain.com`). The stream will use this URL directly and avoid proxy timeouts.

Restart the dev server and backend to verify. The stream should stay active instead of stopping after a few seconds.

          {
            "text": "def _load_embeddings_sync() -&gt; list[tuple[int, list[float]]]:",
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"\"\"Load user embeddings from DB (sync, for use in thread). Rebuilds FAISS index.\"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "    global _embeddings_cache, _embeddings_ts",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "    import time",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "    now = time.time()",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "    if _embeddings_cache and (now - _embeddings_ts) &lt; CACHE_TTL:",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "        return _embeddings_cache",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "    try:",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "        SessionLocal = sessionmaker(bind=_get_engine(), autoflush=False)",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "        with SessionLocal() as db:",
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "text": "            result = db.execute(select(User.id, User.face_embedding).where(User.face_embedding.isnot(None)))",
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "            rows = result.all()",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "            _embeddings_cache = [(r[0], r[1]) for r in rows if r[1] is not None and len(r[1]) &gt; 0]",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "            _embeddings_ts = now",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "        # Rebuild FAISS index for fast vector search",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "        try:",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "            from app.vector_db.faiss_index import rebuild_faiss_from_embeddings",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "            rebuild_faiss_from_embeddings(_embeddings_cache)",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "        except Exception as e:",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "            logger.debug(f\"FAISS rebuild skip: {e}\")",
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "    except Exception as e:",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "text": "        logger.warning(f\"Failed to load embeddings: {e}\")",
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "text": "    return _embeddings_cache",
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": "def _save_unknown_face_crop(frame: np.ndarray, bbox: list, camera_id: int) -&gt; Optional[str]:",
            "lineNumber": 60,

            "text": "    ",

      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./backend/app/services/recognition_pipeline.py",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 60,

          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "\"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "text": "Visioryx - Recognition Pipeline",
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "Process frame: detect faces, match, classify known/unknown.",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": "\"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "from typing import Optional",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "import cv2",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "import numpy as np",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "from app.ai.face_detector import detect_faces",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": "from app.ai.face_matcher import find_best_match",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "from app.core.config import get_settings",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "from app.core.logger import get_logger",
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "logger = get_logger(\"recognition_pipeline\")",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "async def process_frame(",
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "    frame: np.ndarray,",
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "    db_embeddings: list[tuple[int, list[float]]],",
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": ") -&gt; list[dict]:",
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "    Process single frame for face recognition.",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "    Returns list of {user_id?, status, confidence, bbox, embedding}",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "    settings = get_settings()",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "    faces = detect_faces(frame)",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "    results = []",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "    for f in faces:",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "        bbox = f[\"bbox\"]",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "        embedding = f.get(\"embedding\")",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "        det_score = f.get(\"det_score\", 1.0)",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "        if det_score &lt; settings.FACE_DETECTION_CONFIDENCE:",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "            continue",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "        if embedding is None:",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "            results.append({",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "                \"status\": \"unknown\",",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "                \"confidence\": 0,",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "                \"bbox\": bbox,",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "                \"user_id\": None,",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "            })",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "            continue",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "        match = find_best_match(embedding, db_embeddings)",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "        if match:",
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "text": "            user_id, sim = match",
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "            results.append({",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "                \"user_id\": user_id,",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "                \"status\": \"known\",",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "                \"confidence\": sim,",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "                \"bbox\": bbox,",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "                \"embedding\": embedding,",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "            })",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "        else:",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "            results.append({",
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "                \"user_id\": None,",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "text": "                \"status\": \"unknown\",",
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "text": "                \"confidence\": 0,",
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "text": "                \"bbox\": bbox,",
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "text": "                \"embedding\": embedding,",
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": "            })",
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "text": "    return results",
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "isSignature": true
          }
        ]
      },

          },

            "lineNumber": 102
          },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./backend/app/ai/face_detector.py",

        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "def detect_faces(frame: np.ndarray) -&gt; list[dict]:",
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "    Detect faces in BGR frame.",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "    Returns list of {bbox: [x1,y1,x2,y2], landmarks, embedding (if available)}",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "    app = _get_face_app()",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "    if app == \"opencv\":",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "        return _detect_faces_opencv(frame)",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "    faces = app.get(frame)",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "    result = []",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "    for f in faces:",
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "text": "        emb = None",
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "        if hasattr(f, \"embedding\") and f.embedding is not None:",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "            emb = f.embedding.tolist()",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "        result.append({",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "            \"bbox\": f.bbox.astype(int).tolist(),",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "            \"landmarks\": getattr(f, \"kps\", None),",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "            \"embedding\": emb,",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "            \"det_score\": float(getattr(f, \"det_score\", 1.0)),",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "        })",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "    return result",
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "text": "def _detect_faces_opencv(frame: np.ndarray) -&gt; list[dict]:",
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"\"\"Fallback: OpenCV Haar cascade (no embedding).\"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 58
          }
        ]
      },

      "codeBlock": {

        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "async def _process_queue():",
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"\"\"Process detection queue (run in main event loop).\"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "text": "    while True:",
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "text": "        try:",
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "text": "            if _detection_queue.empty():",
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "text": "                await asyncio.sleep(1)",
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "text": "                continue",
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "text": "            item = _detection_queue.get_nowait()",
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "text": "            if item[0] == \"face\":",
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "text": "                _, camera_id, user_id, status, confidence, snapshot_path, embedding = item",
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "text": "                await log_detection(",
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "text": "                    camera_id, user_id, status, confidence,",
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "text": "                    snapshot=snapshot_path,",
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "text": "                    bbox=None,",
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "text": "                )",
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "text": "                if status == \"unknown\" and snapshot_path and embedding:",
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "text": "                    await _log_unknown_face(camera_id, snapshot_path, embedding)",
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "text": "            elif item[0] == \"object\":",
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "text": "                _, camera_id, object_name, confidence, bbox = item",
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "text": "                await log_object_detection(camera_id, object_name, confidence, bbox)",
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {
            "text": "        except queue.Empty:",
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "text": "            await asyncio.sleep(0.5)",
            "lineNumber": 84
          },
          {
            "text": "        except Exception as e:",
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "text": "            logger.warning(f\"Detection log error: {e}\")",
            "lineNumber": 86
          },
          {
            "text": "            await asyncio.sleep(1)",
            "lineNumber": 87,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89
          },

            "text": "    ",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./backend/app/services/detection_log_queue.py",
        "range": {

        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "\"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "text": "Visioryx - Detection Log Queue",
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "Thread-safe queue for detection events from capture threads.",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": "Background task processes queue and calls log_detection / log_object_detection.",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "\"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "text": "import asyncio",
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "import queue",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "import time",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "from typing import Any, Optional",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": "from app.core.logger import get_logger",
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "from app.services.logging_service import log_detection, log_object_detection",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "logger = get_logger(\"detection_log_queue\")",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "_detection_queue: queue.Queue = queue.Queue()",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "_last_logged_face: dict[tuple[int, Optional[int]], float] = {}",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "_last_logged_object: dict[tuple[int, str], float] = {}",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "LOG_THROTTLE_SEC = 5.0  # Max 1 log per (camera_id, user_id) per 5 sec",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "OBJECT_THROTTLE_SEC = 10.0  # Throttle object logs per (camera_id, object_name)",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "def enqueue_detection(",
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "    camera_id: int,",
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "    user_id: Optional[int],",
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "    status: str,",
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "    confidence: float,",
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "    snapshot_path: Optional[str] = None,",
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "    embedding: Optional[list[float]] = None,",
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "):",
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"\"\"Enqueue a face detection for async logging (call from sync thread).\"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "    key = (camera_id, user_id)",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "    now = time.time()",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "    if key in _last_logged_face and (now - _last_logged_face[key]) &lt; LOG_THROTTLE_SEC:",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "        return",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "    _last_logged_face[key] = now",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "    try:",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "        _detection_queue.put_nowait(",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "            (\"face\", camera_id, user_id, status, confidence, snapshot_path, embedding)",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "        )",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "    except queue.Full:",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "        pass",
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "text": "def enqueue_object_detection(",
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "    camera_id: int,",

          },
          {
            "text": "    object_name: str,",

          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 48,

          },

            "isSignature": true

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./backend/app/services/detection_overlay.py",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 56
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "\"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "text": "Visioryx - Detection Overlay",
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "Draw face and object detection boxes on frames (sync, for use in capture thread).",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": "\"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "import os",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "text": "import time",
            "lineNumber": 6
          },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./backend/app/core/config.py",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 66,
            "column": 21
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "\"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "text": "Visioryx - Core Configuration",
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "Centralized configuration management using Pydantic Settings.",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": "\"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "from functools import lru_cache",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "text": "from typing import Optional",
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "from pydantic_settings import BaseSettings, SettingsConfigDict",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "text": "class Settings(BaseSettings):",
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"\"\"Application settings loaded from environment variables.\"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13
          },
          {
            "text": "    model_config = SettingsConfigDict(",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "        env_file=\".env\",",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "        env_file_encoding=\"utf-8\",",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "        case_sensitive=False,",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "    )",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "    # Application",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "    APP_NAME: str = \"Visioryx\"",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "    APP_VERSION: str = \"1.0.0\"",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "    DEBUG: bool = False",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "    # API",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "    API_V1_PREFIX: str = \"/api/v1\"",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "    # Database",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "    DATABASE_URL: str = \"postgresql+asyncpg://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/visioryx\"",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "    DATABASE_URL_SYNC: str = \"postgresql://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/visioryx\"",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "    # JWT Security",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "    SECRET_KEY: str = \"change-this-in-production-use-openssl-rand-hex-32\"",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "    ALGORITHM: str = \"HS256\"",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "    ACCESS_TOKEN_EXPIRE_MINUTES: int = 60 * 24  # 24 hours",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "    # Face Recognition",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "    FACE_SIMILARITY_THRESHOLD: float = 0.6  # Cosine similarity threshold",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "    FACE_DETECTION_CONFIDENCE: float = 0.5",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "    EMBEDDING_DIMENSION: int = 512",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "text": "    # Object Detection",
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "    OBJECT_DETECTION_CONFIDENCE: float = 0.5",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "    OBJECT_DETECTION_IOU_THRESHOLD: float = 0.45",
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "    # Processing",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "    FRAME_SKIP_RATE: int = 2  # Process every Nth frame",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "text": "    MAX_CAMERAS: int = 16",
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "    FRAME_QUEUE_SIZE: int = 10",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "    # Storage Paths",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "    STORAGE_PATH: str = \"storage\"",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "    REGISTERED_FACES_PATH: str = \"storage/registered_faces\"",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "    UNKNOWN_FACES_PATH: str = \"storage/unknown_faces\"",
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "    SNAPSHOTS_PATH: str = \"storage/snapshots\"",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "text": "    # WebSocket",
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "text": "    WS_HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL: int = 30",
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": "    # GPU (Optional)",
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "text": "    CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES: Optional[str] = None",
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "text": "@lru_cache",
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "text": "def get_settings() -&gt; Settings:",
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"\"\"Cached settings instance.\"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "text": "    return Settings()",
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "isSignature": true
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.3845694065093994
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./backend/app/services/detection_overlay.py",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 56,
            "column": 28
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 104
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "def _save_unknown_face_crop(frame: np.ndarray, bbox: list, camera_id: int) -&gt; Optional[str]:",
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"\"\"Save unknown face crop to storage. Returns relative path or None.\"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "text": "    try:",
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "text": "        settings = get_settings()",
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "text": "        path_dir = settings.UNKNOWN_FACES_PATH",
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "text": "        os.makedirs(path_dir, exist_ok=True)",
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "text": "        x1, y1, x2, y2 = [int(x) for x in bbox[:4]]",
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "text": "        h, w = frame.shape[:2]",
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "text": "        x1, y1 = max(0, x1), max(0, y1)",
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "text": "        x2, y2 = min(w, x2), min(h, y2)",
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "text": "        if x2 &lt;= x1 or y2 &lt;= y1:",
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "text": "            return None",
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "text": "        crop = frame[y1:y2, x1:x2]",
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "text": "        if crop.size == 0:",
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "text": "            return None",
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "text": "        fname = f\"unknown_{int(time.time())}_{camera_id}_{uuid.uuid4().hex[:8]}.jpg\"",
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "text": "        full_path = os.path.join(path_dir, fname)",
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "text": "        cv2.imwrite(full_path, crop)",
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "text": "        return os.path.join(path_dir, fname)",
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "text": "    except Exception as e:",
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "text": "        logger.debug(f\"Save unknown face skip: {e}\")",
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "text": "        return None",
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "text": "def _draw_detections(frame: np.ndarray, faces: list[dict], objects: list[dict]) -&gt; np.ndarray:",
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "    ",
            "lineNumber": 85
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.38288235664367676
    },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./backend/app/ai/face_embedding.py",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {},
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 36
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "\"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "text": "Visioryx - Face Embedding",
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "Extract face embeddings for matching.",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": "\"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "from typing import Optional",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "import cv2",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "import numpy as np",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "text": "from app.ai.face_detector import detect_faces",
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12
          },
          {
            "text": "def extract_embedding(frame: np.ndarray, bbox: Optional[list[int]] = None) -&gt; Optional[list[float]]:",
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 14
          },
          {
            "text": "    Extract embedding for a single face.",
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "text": "    If bbox provided, crop and use; else use first detected face.",
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "text": "    faces = detect_faces(frame)",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "    if not faces:",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "        return None",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "    if bbox:",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "        for f in faces:",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "            if f.get(\"embedding\") is not None:",
            "lineNumber": 23

      "codeBlock": {

        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "\"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 1
          },
          {
            "text": "Visioryx - Logging Service",
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "text": "Log detection events to database and broadcast via WebSocket.",
            "lineNumber": 3
          },
          {
            "text": "\"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 4
          },
          {
            "text": "from typing import Any, Optional",
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6
          },
          {
            "text": "from app.core.websocket_manager import ws_manager",
            "lineNumber": 7
          },
          {
            "text": "from app.database.connection import AsyncSessionLocal",
            "lineNumber": 8
          },
          {
            "text": "from app.database.models import Alert, Detection, ObjectDetection",
            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11
          },
          {
            "text": "async def log_object_detection(",
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "    camera_id: int,",
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 14,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 15,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "    bbox: Optional[dict | list] = None,",
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": ") -&gt; int:",
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"\"\"Log object detection to DB and broadcast. Returns detection id.\"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 18
          },
          {
            "text": "    bbox_dict = None",
            "lineNumber": 19
          },
          {
            "text": "    if bbox is not None:",
            "lineNumber": 20
          },
          {
            "text": "        bbox_dict = {\"x1\": bbox[0], \"y1\": bbox[1], \"x2\": bbox[2], \"y2\": bbox[3]} if isinstance(bbox, (list, tuple)) and len(bbox) &gt;= 4 else bbox",
            "lineNumber": 21
          },
          {
            "text": "    async with AsyncSessionLocal() as db:",
            "lineNumber": 22
          },
          {
            "text": "        obj = ObjectDetection(",
            "lineNumber": 23
          },
          {
            "text": "            camera_id=camera_id,",
            "lineNumber": 24
          },
          {
            "text": "            object_name=object_name,",
            "lineNumber": 25
          },
          {
            "text": "            confidence=confidence,",
            "lineNumber": 26
          },
          {
            "text": "            bbox=bbox_dict,",
            "lineNumber": 27
          },
          {
            "text": "        )",
            "lineNumber": 28
          },
          {
            "text": "        db.add(obj)",
            "lineNumber": 29
          },
          {
            "text": "        await db.commit()",
            "lineNumber": 30
          },
          {
            "text": "        await db.refresh(obj)",
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "text": "        await ws_manager.broadcast(",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "            \"object_detected\",",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "            {",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "                \"camera_id\": camera_id,",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "                \"object_name\": object_name,",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "                \"confidence\": confidence,",
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "text": "                \"object_id\": obj.id,",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "            },",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "        )",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "        return obj.id",
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "async def log_detection(",
            "lineNumber": 44,

          },
          {

          },

          {

          {

          },

          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {

          },
          {

          },

            "lineNumber": 83
          },

          },

            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86
          },
          {
            "text": "    camera = relationship(\"Camera\", back_populates=\"objects\")",
            "lineNumber": 87,

          },

            "lineNumber": 88
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89
          },

            "lineNumber": 91

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "./backend/app/vector_db/faiss_index.py",
        "range": {
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 33,
            "column": 38
          },
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 113
          }
        },
        "signatures": {},
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "text": "class FAISSIndex:",
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "text": "    FAISS index for fast face embedding search.",
            "lineNumber": 39
          },
          {
            "text": "    Uses IndexFlatIP (inner product) with L2-normalized vectors = cosine similarity.",
            "lineNumber": 40
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 41
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42
          },
          {
            "text": "    def __init__(self, dimension: int = 512):",
            "lineNumber": 43
          },
          {
            "text": "        self.dimension = dimension",
            "lineNumber": 44
          },
          {
            "text": "        self._index: Optional[\"faiss.IndexFlatIP\"] = None",
            "lineNumber": 45
          },
          {
            "text": "        self._id_map: list[int] = []  # index position -&gt; user_id",
            "lineNumber": 46
          },
          {
            "text": "        self._count = 0",
            "lineNumber": 47
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48
          },
          {
            "text": "    def rebuild(self, embeddings: list[tuple[int, list[float]]]) -&gt; None:",
            "lineNumber": 49
          },
          {
            "text": "        \"\"\"Rebuild index from (user_id, embedding) pairs.\"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 50
          },
          {
            "text": "        if not _FAISS_AVAILABLE:",
            "lineNumber": 51
          },
          {
            "text": "            return",
            "lineNumber": 52
          },
          {
            "text": "        valid = [(uid, emb) for uid, emb in embeddings if emb is not None and len(emb) == self.dimension]",
            "lineNumber": 53
          },
          {
            "text": "        if not valid:",
            "lineNumber": 54
          },
          {
            "text": "            self._index = None",
            "lineNumber": 55
          },
          {
            "text": "            self._id_map = []",
            "lineNumber": 56
          },
          {
            "text": "            self._count = 0",
            "lineNumber": 57
          },
          {
            "text": "            return",
            "lineNumber": 58
          },
          {
            "text": "        ids = [x[0] for x in valid]",
            "lineNumber": 59
          },
          {
            "text": "        vecs = np.array([x[1] for x in valid], dtype=np.float32)",
            "lineNumber": 60
          },
          {
            "text": "        vecs = _l2_normalize(vecs)",
            "lineNumber": 61
          },
          {
            "text": "        idx = faiss.IndexFlatIP(self.dimension)",
            "lineNumber": 62
          },
          {
            "text": "        idx.add(vecs)",
            "lineNumber": 63
          },
          {
            "text": "        self._index = idx",
            "lineNumber": 64
          },
          {
            "text": "        self._id_map = ids",
            "lineNumber": 65
          },
          {
            "text": "        self._count = len(ids)",
            "lineNumber": 66
          },
          {
            "text": "        logger.info(f\"FAISS index rebuilt with {self._count} embeddings\")",
            "lineNumber": 67
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "text": "    def search(self, embedding: list[float] | np.ndarray, threshold: float) -&gt; Optional[tuple[int, float]]:",
            "lineNumber": 69
          },
          {
            "text": "        \"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 70
          },
          {
            "text": "        Search for best matching user. Returns (user_id, similarity) or None.",
            "lineNumber": 71
          },
          {
            "text": "        Similarity is cosine (0-1 for normalized vectors via inner product).",
            "lineNumber": 72
          },
          {
            "text": "        \"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 73
          },
          {
            "text": "        if not _FAISS_AVAILABLE or self._index is None or self._count == 0:",
            "lineNumber": 74
          },
          {
            "text": "            return None",
            "lineNumber": 75
          },
          {
            "text": "        emb = np.array(embedding, dtype=np.float32).reshape(1, -1)",
            "lineNumber": 76
          },
          {
            "text": "        emb = _l2_normalize(emb)",
            "lineNumber": 77
          },
          {
            "text": "        scores, indices = self._index.search(emb, 1)",
            "lineNumber": 78
          },
          {
            "text": "        if indices[0, 0] &lt; 0:",
            "lineNumber": 79
          },
          {
            "text": "            return None",
            "lineNumber": 80
          },
          {
            "text": "        sim = float(scores[0, 0])",
            "lineNumber": 81
          },
          {
            "text": "        if sim &lt; threshold:",
            "lineNumber": 82
          },
          {
            "text": "            return None",
            "lineNumber": 83
          },
          {
            "text": "        user_id = self._id_map[indices[0, 0]]",
            "lineNumber": 84
          },
          {
            "text": "        return (user_id, sim)",
            "lineNumber": 85
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86
          },
          {
            "text": "    @property",
            "lineNumber": 87
          },
          {
            "text": "    def count(self) -&gt; int:",
            "lineNumber": 88
          },
          {
            "text": "        \"\"\"Number of vectors in the index.\"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 89
          },
          {
            "text": "        return self._count",
            "lineNumber": 90
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.3567042350769043
    },

          {
            "text": "def extract_embeddings_from_image(image_path: str) -&gt; list[list[float]]:",
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "isSignature": true
          },
          {
            "text": "    \"\"\"Extract all face embeddings from image file.\"\"\"",
            "lineNumber": 32
          },
          {
            "text": "    img = cv2.imread(image_path)",
            "lineNumber": 33
          },
          {
            "text": "    if img is None:",
            "lineNumber": 34
          },
          {
            "text": "        return []",
            "lineNumber": 35
          },
          {
            "text": "    faces = detect_faces(img)",
            "lineNumber": 36
          },
          {
            "text": "    return [f[\"embedding\"] for f in faces if f.get(\"embedding\") is not None]",
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "isSignature": true
          }
        ]
      },
      "score": 0.3347809314727783

    {

---

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
**Reviewing embedding loading**

I found that _load_embeddings_sync uses sync DB engine and loads from User table, but face_embedding data may not be committed yet due to flush timing. The cache TTL of 60 seconds means new faces might not be recognized for up to 60 seconds after upload. I'm adding cache invalidation on upload to improve face recognition latency. </details></think>
